title: log engine journald does not output logs to journald
body:
### Issue Description

If I do `journalctl -f` and start a container, I do not see any logs in journalctl. If I run `podman logs` with the container ID, i see the logs. 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. tail journal
2. start a container



### Describe the results you received

no logs

### Describe the results you expected

logs

### podman info output

```yaml
podmain 5.0.1
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: please file out the bug template as requested, we need the output of  `podman info`
@Luap99 thank you, looks like journald is not always the default, in spite of the podman docs. podman info shows it is `k8s-file`. Will try explicitly setting it to journald
